metadata.title: Robustness & Sensitivity: 4-Variant Analysis
metadata.description: Four pipeline variants testing sensitivity to punctuation, length threshold, and projectivity constraints on dependency distance autocorrelation excess.

examples.predict_baseline_rpl: {"description": "Random projective linearization baseline (100 permutations per sentence)", "pooled_baseline_r1": "computed per-sentence, subtracted to get excess"}
